title: CA LCFS Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q4 2024: Bio-LNG Credits Climb in Q4 2024 While Diesel Deficits Decline
content:
Key Highlights:

Q4 2024 witnessed strong growth in LCFS credit generation, led by sharp increases from Bio-LNG, alternative jet fuel, and EV charging. Meanwhile, diesel-related deficits declined. Bio-LNG reported a negative carbon intensity for the first timeâ€”indicating a gradual shift in the emissions profile of clean fuels. Despite a decline in overall Bio-LNG volumes, credits rose significantly due to the drop in CI, largely driven by increased use of dairy manure-based renewable natural gas.
author: Mansift Kaur
